creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
so either you use the whole gnu/glib solution, or use the whole BSD one. using half and half is impossible because they define different things, sadly.

I'd override the hard coding, and who cares if 12 is broken. If it is broken by the decoupling, then let it be broken... there's only a few more weeks / days left of 12 support anyway, and that's an acceptable fallout imho.
